claim.text: Mapped the prior-authorization workflow end to end and prototyped a first-pass-summary agent with a human-approval step

findings.rationale: Describes a sensible human-in-the-loop design, but the prototype itself is not included to inspect.

claim.text: Ran the change-management rollout of an internal tool across 40 staff

findings.rationale: An enterprise-fluency signal, but adoption outcomes cannot be verified from the materials.

matcher_notes: Operations-to-builder path: real workflow and enterprise instincts, thin on built artifacts. The questions probe what the prototype actually does and how adoption went, which is where this candidate is strongest.
